name: Feature / chapter request
about: Suggest a new chapter, section, or tooling improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What's missing?

<!-- One paragraph. What gap does this fill? -->

## Where would it live?

<!-- A specific Part / file path. The guide's discipline is "deepen, don't
     duplicate" — proposals that overlap existing chapters get pushed back
     toward the existing chapter for an extension. -->

## Why now?

<!-- What changed in the ecosystem (new tool, new pattern, deprecation) or
     what feedback signal prompted this? -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- A bullet outline of how the chapter / feature would work. -->

## Anything else?
